name: AI DJ — Wake Up
description: Alt-punk / rock jolt to shake off the morning — Linkin Park energy, 2000s emo-punk anthems, melodic-aggressive drivers. Front-loaded and loud. On-demand curation by the AI DJ.
tracks: Fall Out Boy - Sugar, We're Goin Down
My Chemical Romance - Welcome to the Black Parade
Three Days Grace - Animal I Have Become
A Day To Remember - All I Want
All Time Low - Dear Maria, Count Me In
The All-American Rejects - Gives You Hell
Panic! At The Disco - Hey Look Ma, I Made It
